access.clinicBlockedDescription: This clinic is currently {status}. Staff access has been restricted by the platform administrator.
access.deniedDescription: You don't have permission to view this page.
access.privilegedRequiredDescription: This page is reserved for elevated platform administrators.
access.featureUnavailableDescription: This module is not enabled for the current clinic subscription.

mfa.noSetupDescription: This account does not currently hold a privileged role.
mfa.superAdminDescription: Super admins must keep TOTP MFA enrolled and use an aal2 session before they can access privileged pages.
mfa.clinicAdminDescription: Clinic admins must keep TOTP MFA enrolled before they can use tenant-wide security actions.
mfa.notEnrolled: No MFA factor is enrolled yet. Privileged actions stay blocked until TOTP enrollment is complete.
mfa.authenticatorDescription: Use an authenticator app to scan the QR code and enter the one-time code.
